name: Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry study
summary: A single-arm phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry study of intravenous AAV-hTERT for aging. ClinicalTrials.gov still listed unknown status and no posted results in the June 14, 2026 API check.

trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists estimated primary and study completion in January 2021; no results were posted in the June 14, 2026 API check.
trial_details.horizon_note: Unknown registry status with no posted results, so this remains stale program context rather than evidence of benefit or safety.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Telomerase Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, biomarkers, and function in Adults aged 45 years or older. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
